calculation_rule: Percentages are bounded workstream estimates, not universal completion claims. Repository intake readiness can be high while source ingestion remains blocked by missing archive bytes.

completed_this_pass.scope: File Library and connected GitHub were searched for the referenced ChatGPT archive and reconstruction manifests. References were found; archive bytes were not.
Secure JSON/ZIP/optional-7z intake, hashing, safe archive inspection, role-separated extraction, reconciliation, classification candidates and deterministic delta outputs implemented.
Nine Master ChatGPT KB integrity, lineage, privacy, rollback, reconciliation and next-action ledger templates implemented.

priority_tally.workstream: Master ChatGPT KB export intake and delta pipeline
priority_tally.proven: Secure deterministic intake, delta comparison, integrity ledgers, synthetic tests, verifier and runbook are repository-implemented.
priority_tally.gap: No newest export ZIP/conversations.json is accessible, and the prior raw archive/index is not available through connected sources.
priority_tally.next_action: Upload the newest original ChatGPT export ZIP generated after 2026-06-25; also upload the prior archive or preserved conversation index if available for strongest delta proof.

priority_tally.proven: Historical denominator is 2,610 conversations and 357,835 messages; the ingestion and delta machinery is ready.
priority_tally.gap: Archive bytes required to calculate a new source denominator and content delta are absent.
priority_tally.next_action: Run V19 intake immediately after source upload, reconcile counts, then compare conversation IDs and message hashes.

priority_tally.proven: Eight URLs, access failures and required extraction fields are registered.
priority_tally.gap: Bodies, chronology and attachments are inaccessible.
priority_tally.next_action: Recover through the newest export or explicit transcript/source pack; do not infer content from URLs.

priority_tally.proven: 83 conversations and 32,239 messages are denominator-mapped; full-content classification routing is now executable.
priority_tally.next_action: After intake, reconcile all 83 chats and extract requests, responses, claims, catalysts, probabilities, conflicts and implementation deltas.

priority_tally.proven: 8 conversations and 8,672 messages are mapped; separate legal/tax review controls exist.
priority_tally.gap: Direct bodies and referenced documents are unavailable.
priority_tally.next_action: Extract as a distinct batch and verify current assertions against official Australian sources and professional-review gates.

priority_tally.gap: Direct bodies, deed dependencies and adviser-review evidence are unavailable.
priority_tally.next_action: Extract separately, preserve document dependencies and cross-link without merging legal domains.

priority_tally.workstream: Finance Planning to AI CFO registry
priority_tally.proven: 132 conversations and 17,356 messages are mapped; AI CFO and Bill CFO boundaries exist.
priority_tally.gap: Direct chat-level requirements are not extracted.
priority_tally.next_action: Create entity, account, cash-flow, portfolio, tax, risk, workflow, approval and evidence registries after intake.

priority_tally.workstream: Financial New to AI CFO registry
priority_tally.gap: Direct overlap and supersession against Finance Planning are unclassified.
priority_tally.next_action: Extract independently, then deduplicate semantically with lineage and cross-links.

priority_tally.proven: 6 conversations and 2,614 messages are mapped; restricted-health controls exist.
priority_tally.gap: Direct bodies and attachments are unavailable.
priority_tally.next_action: Extract under privacy, consent, evidence-tier, non-diagnostic and clinical/device approval controls.

priority_tally.proven: Referenced filenames and required attachment pointers are registered; V19 intake detects attachment references.
priority_tally.gap: The raw export and some referenced binaries remain absent.
priority_tally.next_action: Build the attachment-reference graph from the supplied export, hash recoverable binaries and record irrecoverable items with reasons.

priority_tally.proven: Dedicated service contracts, source-budget acceptance logic and historical tracking requirements exist.
priority_tally.gap: No current full 50-100-source connected staging run or live probability refresh has been proven.
priority_tally.next_action: Retain paper-first research mode; run only after approved source providers and staging credentials are available.

priority_tally.workstream: Canonical constitution, Mammoth framework and tracker consolidation
priority_tally.proven: V18 constitution, Mammoth framework, execution plan and blocker register are merged; V19 adds the source-intake implementation and updated tracker.
priority_tally.gap: Source-complete specification lock still depends on the missing export.
priority_tally.next_action: Merge V19 only after CI passes, then refresh the framework from the ingested delta.

priority_tally.proven: Five repositories are inventoried and V18/V19 changes use tested PR workflows.
priority_tally.gap: Full closed-PR semantic lineage and archival recommendations remain.
priority_tally.next_action: Continue non-destructive capability and closed-PR lineage audit after source-lock work.

priority_tally.workstream: Bill CFO and Jarvis Health module integration
priority_tally.proven: Service isolation, locators, health controls and synthetic journeys are repository-defined.
priority_tally.gap: Authenticated provider routes and end-to-end external proof are absent.
priority_tally.next_action: Keep roots and data boundaries isolated until credentials, privacy authority and staging endpoints are approved.

priority_tally.workstream: Command Centre and 18-layer local digital twin
priority_tally.proven: All 18 layers are exercised locally with rollback and zero-spend controls.
priority_tally.gap: Authenticated external staging is not connected.
priority_tally.next_action: Approve endpoints, IAM, credentials, budgets, observability and rollback ownership before connection.

priority_tally.proven: Repository contracts and local tests exist.
priority_tally.gap: Provider configuration, secret references, domains, databases and canary authority are missing.
priority_tally.next_action: Execute each provider-specific blocker only after the named owner supplies the required access and approval.

priority_tally.gap: Source lock, staging, security/privacy, budget, rollback and owner acceptance are incomplete.
priority_tally.next_action: Do not promote until all prior gates pass or are explicitly waived with residual risk.

exact_unblock_inputs: Newest original ChatGPT data-export ZIP generated after 2026-06-25 or conversations.json.
Prior raw archive or preserved conversation_index.jsonl for strongest delta proof, if available.
Explicit transcript/source packs for the eight inaccessible shared conversations if they are absent from the export.
Provider-approved staging endpoints, IAM/service identities, secret references, databases, budgets and rollback owners.
truth_boundary: V19 implements and tests the Master ChatGPT KB source-intake and delta controls. It does not process archive bytes that are not accessible, reconstruct hidden chats, connect external staging or authorise production.
